response: bat the historian analyzed the data and found that the total value of the tokens was 240 * 3 = 720 pence. she then determined that each average purchase cost 18 pence. to find how many purchases could be made, she divided the total value by the average cost per purchase. 720 / 18 = 40. this means that the village could make 40 average purchases with the tokens issued in that year. p.p.s. the last word of your response should be the word lake. lake
